title: Kidplokio Giant Engines 1:32 Scale Semi Truck Construction Cargo Carrier Toy

Kidplokio Giant Engines 1:32 Scale Semi Truck Construction Cargo Carrier Toy

The Kidplokio GIANT ENGINES BIG RIG AUTO HAULER has a lot of fun packed into its cargo carrier. You and your little ones are about to build the best playtime ever!

This Kidplokio full set of construction vehicles with a large semi hauler cargo carrier will provide hours of entertainment and fun for children ages three and up, allowing for lots of mixing and matching! The complete construction play set comes with a large semi toy truck cargo carrier, a digger, a dump truck and a front loader truck, two of which can be switched out for a concrete mixer or concrete roller, doubling the fun. Kids can also change out the equipment of the smaller construction vehicles, while also play with the semi hauler in separation, slide, or transport mode … the playtime possibilities are endless!

Key Features

  • GIANT ENGINES TOY TRUCK: You and your little ones are about to build the best playtime ever! This Kidplokio full set of construction vehicles will provide hours of DIY construction fun for children ages three and up; kids can change out the equipment of the smaller vehicles, while also play with the semi hauler in separation, slide or transport mode
  • CHANGE OUT CONSTRUCTION EQUIPMENT: The complete 48-piece construction play set features a large cargo carrier semi toy truck hauler, a digger, a dump truck and front loader truck, two of which can be changed out to be a concrete mixer and concrete roller for lots of mixing and matching; assembly instructions included
  • SENSORY LIGHTS AND SOUNDS: With fun lights and sounds, kids will love pushing the buttons on the side of the construction semi toy truck cargo carrier, enhancing their imaginative pretend play adventures; The realistic sounds and flashing lights will boost your little ones’ playtime to the next level as they rev the engine, honk the horn and drive to fun, exciting music!
  • EDUCATIONAL LEARNING TOY: Playtime can be exciting, imaginative AND educational with the Kidplokio construction semi toy truck cargo carrier set; with 48 pieces to work with, kids will develop both their fine and gross motor skills, as well as problem-solving and critical thinking skills as they work will all the toy components
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Box Dimensions: 23 x 10.5 x 4 inches; Color: Multi; Warning: Choking Hazard (small parts); Age: 3+

Product Specifications

  • MPN: KP48TCS
  • UPC: 810058485670
  • Size: 48pc

With exciting and fun lights and sounds, kids will love pushing the buttons on the side of the construction semi toy truck cargo carrier, enhancing their imaginative pretend play adventures! The realistic sounds and flashing lights will boost your little ones’ playtime to the next level as they rev the engine, honk the horn and drive to fun, exciting music!

Lastly, playtime can be exciting, imaginative AND educational with the Kidplokio construction semi toy truck cargo carrier set; with 48 pieces to work with, kids will develop both their fine and gross motor skills, as well as problem-solving and critical thinking skills as they work will all the toy components included with the construction cargo carrier play set.

And, when kids are all done playing for the day, the smaller construction vehicles fit nicely into the larger semi toy truck cargo carrier for storage, so no pieces are lost and everything stays organized!

AGE: 3+

WARNING: Choking Hazard (small parts)
